offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 clients/month, manual data entry causes late filings. We automate regulatory filing generation instead of manual preparation of regulatory forms.
problem: Timely regulatory filings are often delayed due to manual data entry and form generation.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among accountants
try_it: Let users try template-based form generation and data import from spreadsheets on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
